title: How Drugs Are Studied
content_html:
How Drugs Are Studied

A It takes years, and sometimes decades, for a drug to move from the theoretical stage to the pharmacy shelf. Of the thousands of drugs under investigation at any one time, only a small fraction will produce the desired result without unacceptable side effects.

B First, scientists target a step in the disease process where they believe a drug can have an effect. Then they manufacture compounds or take them from organisms such as viruses and fungi and test them in laboratory cultures. Once scientists isolate a chemical that produces a desirable effect, they analyze its structure and alter it as necessary to enhance the outcome.

C The next step involves testing the drug in animals. Scientists look at how much drug is absorbed into the bloodstream, how it distributes to different organs, how quickly it is excreted or leaves the body, and whether it has any toxic effects or by-products. Researchers usually test at least two animal species because the same drug may affect species differently.

D If a chemical passes laboratory and animal testing and is deemed appropriate to analyze in human volunteers, it is ready for clinical trials. Researchers follow a protocol that describes who may participate in the study, tests and procedures to follow, the length of the study, and outcomes to be measured. Drug trials may focus on treating a disease, preventing a disease from occurring or recurring, or enhancing the quality of life for people living with incurable, chronic conditions.

E There are four phases of clinical trials; the first three phases study whether the drug is effective and can be safely administered to patients, and the fourth phase evaluates long-term safety and use once a drug is on the market.

F Phase I clinical trials test a drug in small groups of healthy volunteers (fewer than 100) to ascertain its safety and the appropriate dose range. These studies last for six months to one year.

G Phase II clinical trials test several hundred volunteers to determine how effectively the drug combats the disease being studied. These trials continue to evaluate safety, side effects, and optimal dose. Phase II studies also last for six months to one year.

H Phase III trials test thousands of volunteers for several years, with researchers closely monitoring study participants at regular intervals. These studies typically compare the drug under investigation with a control: either a drug known to cure or alleviate a specific disease or, if one does not exist, a substance that has no medicinal effects, known as a placebo. Phase III trials are typically blind studies (participants do not know which drug they are receiving) or double-blind studies (neither participants nor researchers know which drug an individual is receiving until the trial is completed).

I Once a drug passes the first three phases and is found to be safe and effective, drug companies may apply for the right to market the product. After a drug is approved and on the market, Phase IV trials may investigate longer-term effects, effects in different groups of patients such as the elderly, or use of the medication for a different condition such as using a cancer drug to treat AIDS.

questions.text: Drug tests that involve growing biological material in a laboratory
options: To test its effectiveness in humans
To determine its effect on a specific disease process
questions.question: Drug tests that involve growing biological material in a laboratory
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 1–4

Reading Passage has sections A–I. Which section contains the following information?

Write the correct letter, A–I, in boxes 1–4 on your answer sheet.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
growing biological material
laboratory
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn B:

"test them in laboratory cultures"

Bước 3: Phân tích
laboratory cultures = nuôi cấy sinh học trong phòng thí nghiệm
Paraphrase:
growing biological material = laboratory cultures
Đáp án: B

_blockConfig.noteContent:
**A type of parrot:**
- diet consists of fern fronds, various parts of a tree and [1]
- nests are created in [2] where eggs are laid.
**Arrival of settlers**
- the [3] of the kākāpō were used to make clothes.

questions.text: Investigations of the effects of drugs on animals
questions.question: Investigations of the effects of drugs on animals
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

effects
animals

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn C:

"The next step involves testing the drug in animals."

Bước 3: Phân tích

testing in animals = điều tra tác động của thuốc lên động vật

Paraphrase:

investigations = testing

 Đáp án: C

questions.text: Studies to determine how safe a drug is and how much a patient should take
options: To test a drug's effectiveness in treating a disease
To evaluate a drug's long-term safety and use
To determine a drug's appropriate dose range and safety
To compare a drug with a control
questions.question: Studies to determine how safe a drug is and how much a patient should take
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

safe
how much

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn F:

"ascertain its safety and the appropriate dose range"

Bước 3: Phân tích

safety = độ an toàn

appropriate dose range = lượng thuốc phù hợp nên dùng

Paraphrase:

how much a patient should take = appropriate dose range

Đáp án: F

questions.text: Studies to monitor how well a drug fights a disease
questions.question: Studies to monitor how well a drug fights a disease
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

monitor
fights disease

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn G:

"determine how effectively the drug combats the disease"

Bước 3: Phân tích

combats = fights

effectively = how well

Paraphrase:

how well a drug fights a disease = how effectively the drug combats the disease

Đáp án: G

questions.text: Drug tests on animals look at
options: how the drug is absorbed by the body.
how effective the drug is for chronic conditions.
how well the drug prevents a disease from recurring.
how quickly the drug alleviates the disease.
questions.question: Drug tests on animals look at
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

Drug tests on animals, look at

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn C: "The next step involves testing the drug in animals. Scientists look at how much drug is absorbed into the bloodstream..."

Bước 3: Phân tích

Look at how much drug is absorbed = xem xét lượng thuốc được hấp thụ vào cơ thể.

Paraphrase:

absorbed into the bloodstream (hấp thụ vào dòng máu) = absorbed by the body (hấp thụ bởi cơ thể).

Đáp án: A (how the drug is absorbed by the body)

- diet consists of fern fronds, various parts of a tree and [1]
- nests are created in [2] where eggs are laid.
**Arrival of settlers**
- the [3] of the kākāpō were used to make clothes.

questions.text: During Phase II clinical trials, study participants are monitored for
questions.question: During Phase II clinical trials, study participants are monitored for
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

Phase II

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn G:

"These trials continue to evaluate safety, side effects, and optimal dose."

Bước 3: Phân tích

evaluate side effects = theo dõi tác dụng phụ

Paraphrase:

monitored for = evaluate

Đáp án: D (possible side effects)

questions.text: After a drug is deemed safe and effective, a drug company may do further tests to ascertain
options: the best way to market it.
how it compares with other drugs.
the best group of people to use it.
questions.question: After a drug is deemed safe and effective, a drug company may do further tests to ascertain
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

after safe and effective

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn I:

"Phase IV trials may investigate longer-term effects"

Bước 3: Phân tích

longer-term effects = ảnh hưởng trong thời gian dài

Paraphrase:

ascertain = find out / investigate

possible effects over time = longer-term effects

Đáp án: B

questions.text: A good deal of time, effort, and money is required to thoroughly .......... a new drug before it can be put on the market.
questions.question: A good deal of time, effort, and money is required to thoroughly .......... a new drug before it can be put on the market.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống đứng sau từ chỉ mục đích to và trạng từ bổ nghĩa thoroughly (to thoroughly ..........). Cấu trúc này bắt buộc phải điền một Động từ nguyên mẫu không "to" (Bare Infinitive) để hoàn thiện cụm động từ chỉ mục đích "để làm gì một cách kỹ lưỡng".

Loại trừ đáp án sai:

investigation (Danh từ): Sự điều tra, nghiên cứu.

investigator (Danh từ chỉ người): Nghiên cứu viên, điều tra viên.

_blockConfig.noteContent:
**A type of parrot:**
- diet consists of fern fronds, various parts of a tree and [1]
- nests are created in [2] where eggs are laid.
**Arrival of settlers**
- the [3] of the kākāpō were used to make clothes.

questions.text: Scientists develop a .......... about the ability of a certain substance to combat a specific disease or medical condition.
questions.question: Scientists develop a .......... about the ability of a certain substance to combat a specific disease or medical condition.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống nằm giữa mạo từ a và giới từ about (develop a .......... about). Theo quy tắc cấu trúc cụm danh từ, đứng ngay sau mạo từ "a/an" bắt buộc phải là một Danh từ đếm được số ít.

Loại trừ đáp án sai:

theorize (Động từ): Đưa ra giả thuyết.

theoretical (Tính từ): Mang tính lý thuyết.

questions.text: They monitor the .......... of the drug by the body
questions.question: They monitor the .......... of the drug by the body
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống nằm trong cấu trúc kinh điển và rất phổ biến trong IELTS: the + .......... + of. Đứng sau mạo từ xác định "the", chúng ta bắt buộc phải điền một Danh từ để làm tân ngữ cho động từ "monitor" (theo dõi cái gì).

Loại trừ đáp án sai:

absorb (Động từ): Hấp thụ.

absorbent (Tính từ / Danh từ): Có tính hút nước / chất thấm hút (không hợp nghĩa).

questions.text: and they look for any .......... that may be produced as the drug moves through the body.
questions.question: and they look for any .......... that may be produced as the drug moves through the body.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Chỗ trống đứng sau từ hạn định any (bất kỳ) và đứng trước mệnh đề quan hệ that may be produced (thứ mà có thể được sinh ra). Vị trí này yêu cầu một Danh từ (số nhiều hoặc không đếm được). Vì thuốc khi đi vào cơ thể có thể sinh ra nhiều chất độc/tác dụng phụ khác nhau, ta chọn danh từ số nhiều "toxins".

Loại trừ đáp án sai:

toxic (Tính từ): Độc hại. (Tính từ không thể đứng làm chủ ngữ cho mệnh đề quan hệ phía sau).

toxically (Trạng từ): Một cách độc hại.

questions.text: If they get the outcome that they .......... and the drug cures the disease or alleviates the condition, then it's time to work on marketing the product.
questions.question: If they get the outcome that they .......... and the drug cures the disease or alleviates the condition, then it's time to work on marketing the product.
questions.explanation:
Phân tích ngữ pháp: Xét mệnh đề quan hệ that they ........... Trong mệnh đề này, ta đã có chủ ngữ là đại từ số nhiều they. Vị trí còn thiếu duy nhất để hoàn thành mệnh đề chính là một Động từ chính. Vì toàn bộ bài đọc đang dùng thì Hiện tại đơn để mô tả một quy trình sự thật hiển nhiên, động từ đi với "they" phải giữ ở dạng nguyên mẫu.

Loại trừ đáp án sai:

desires (Danh từ số nhiều / Động từ thêm -s): Nếu là động từ thêm "-s" thì sai ngữ pháp vì chủ ngữ là "they".

desirably (Trạng từ): Một cách đáng thèm muốn.
